metadata.title: Advanced Cursors
metadata.description: Use multiple cursors even more powerfully.

regex.source: Notice("You must be focused on a markdown file.")
regex.target: Notice("您必须聚焦在一个 Markdown 文件上。")

regex.source: Notice("Both 'name' and 'query' must have a value.")
regex.target: Notice("'名称'和'查询'都必须有值。")

regex.source: Notice(`A query with named "${name}" already exists`)
regex.target: Notice(`名为"${name}" 的查询已存在。`)

regex.source: Notice(`Something went wrong when deleting that query. Check the console for errors.`)
regex.target: Notice(`删除该查询时出错。请检查控制台中的错误信息。)

regex.source: Notice(`No instance of '${toSelect}' found anywhere in note (that isn't already selected)
regex.target: Notice(`在笔记中未找到 '${toSelect}' 的任何实例（未被选中）。

regex.source: name: "Move to next instance of current selection"
regex.target: name: "移动到当前选择的下一个实例"

regex.source: name: "Move to previous instance of current selection"
regex.target: name: "移动到当前选择的上一个实例"

regex.source: name: "Add next instance of current selection to selections"
regex.target: name: "将当前选择的下一个实例添加到选择中"

regex.source: name: "Add previous instance of current selection to selections"
regex.target: name: "将当前选择的上一个实例添加到选择中"

regex.source: name: "Add a cursor on the line above"
regex.target: name: "在上方行添加一个光标"

regex.source: name: "Add a cursor on the line below"
regex.target: name: "在下方行添加一个光标"

regex.source: name: "Insert an incrementing value at each cursor"
regex.target: name: "在每个光标位置插入递增值"
text: `正在等待来自 '${source}' 的内容`
.setName("加载时打开已保存查询视图")

regex.source: .setDesc("If off, disables all notifications that are not caused by errors or changing settings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭时，禁用所有非因错误或更改设置而产生的通知。")
